semantic.role: Architectural context resolution engine for dependency analysis and relevance scoring in the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Resolves relative import targets to absolute file paths using project manifest and path resolution.
Extracts architectural rule keywords from source file skeletons to determine relevance.
Computes relevance scores for dependency candidates based on rule keywords, symbol usage, and target paths.
Generates diagnostic interfaces for dependency candidates, symbol targets, and usage targets.
Orchestrates context resolution by aggregating candidate dependencies and producing structured diagnostics.
outOfScope: Direct user interaction or CLI command execution.
Persistence or network I/O beyond file system path resolution.
Service lifecycle management or orchestration of other engines.
invariants: Must remain a pure analysis engine without side effects.
Must depend only on other engine modules, core types, and infrastructure utilities.
Must export diagnostic interfaces for consumption by scanners or presentation layers.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable, decoupled engine for architectural context resolution, enabling dependency analysis and relevance scoring across the ArchSpine system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactored to split scanner and context responsibilities, likely extracting context resolution logic into a dedicated engine module.
